title: prices plugin payloads
description: JSON shapes for the prices.quote, prices.ohlcv, and prices.option_mark namespaces on data.v1. These are advisory — no runtime validation. Consumers cast at read time.

oneOf.title: prices.option_mark
oneOf.description: End-of-period close mark for an option contract (v3). instrument_id = canonical OCC string (e.g. 'BMY 20JUN25 45 P'). observed_at = statement period end. Producer: reference-admin (statement-import path; ADR-0019). A future real-options vendor writes here without view changes.

close.description: per-contract close price in native currency. NOT multiplied by contract_multiplier — kernel/dense MV applies multiplier from instruments table (ADR-0017). Matches IBKR statement Open Positions.Close Price verbatim.

currency.description: contract trade currency, ISO 4217. Should match instruments.currency for the same instrument_id.

oneOf.title: prices.quote
oneOf.description: Bid/ask quote at observed_at. instrument_id = source_id. mid = (bid + ask) / 2 is what the core `prices` VIEW exposes.

oneOf.title: prices.ohlcv
oneOf.description: OHLCV bar covering [observed_at - bar_cadence, observed_at]. instrument_id = source_id. `close` is what the core `prices` VIEW exposes.
